blockingIssues.description: Commit `95ef80b` hardens `TeleprompterView.onExit`, but `src/App.tsx:119` still wraps `unregisterHotkeys()`, `exitTeleprompter()`, and local mode cleanup for the `hotkey://stop` path in one `try`. If `unregisterHotkeys()` rejects there, the overlay can still fail to exit and remain stuck in teleprompter mode.

rejectedObservations.observation: The `frontend-redesign` skill procedure still does not match how small fix sessions are actually executed or reported.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in round 1 synthesis as a systemic frontend-redesign skill guidance issue; this rerun did not add materially different evidence.

rejectedObservations.observation: Workers are still pointed at `.factory/library/README.md` even though this repository has no such shared-library index file.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in round 1 synthesis as a worker bootstrap/shared-library guidance issue; this rerun only repeated the same dead-end lookup.
